laws.name: Never Outshine the Master
laws.essence: Make superiors feel superior. Your talents can threaten those above you.
laws.reversal: Outshine a falling or weak master to hasten their end

laws.name: Never Put Too Much Trust in Friends, Learn How to Use Enemies
laws.essence: Friends betray easily from envy. Former enemies prove more loyal.
laws.reversal: Use friends for low-stakes favors where betrayal cost is low

laws.name: Conceal Your Intentions
laws.essence: Keep people off-balance by never revealing your purpose. They cannot prepare a defense.
laws.reversal: Reveal intentions when transparency builds trust strategically

laws.name: Always Say Less Than Necessary
laws.essence: The more you say, the more common you appear. Powerful people impress by saying less.
laws.reversal: Speak more when silence would seem suspicious or weak

laws.name: So Much Depends on Reputation - Guard It with Your Life
laws.essence: Reputation is the cornerstone of power. Make it unassailable.
laws.reversal: Attack enemy reputation while protecting yours

laws.name: Court Attention at All Cost
laws.essence: Everything is judged by appearance. Be conspicuous, stand out.
laws.reversal: Lay low when attention would invite attack or envy

laws.name: Get Others to Do the Work, but Always Take the Credit
laws.essence: Use others' work to further your cause. You get the efficiency and the glory.
laws.reversal: Give credit when loyalty matters more than glory

laws.name: Make Other People Come to You - Use Bait if Necessary
laws.essence: When you force others to act, you control the game. Lure with gains, then attack.
laws.reversal: Go to them when speed matters more than positioning

laws.name: Win Through Your Actions, Never Through Argument
laws.essence: Arguments create resentment. Demonstrate, don't explicate.
laws.reversal: Argue only when the audience values logic over emotion

laws.name: Infection: Avoid the Unhappy and Unlucky
laws.essence: Emotional states are contagious. Associate with the fortunate.
laws.reversal: Help the unlucky only when the cost is contained

laws.name: Learn to Keep People Dependent on You
laws.essence: Be needed and wanted. The more they depend on you, the more freedom you have.
laws.reversal: Create independence when loyalty is secured by other means

laws.name: Use Selective Honesty and Generosity to Disarm Your Victim
laws.essence: One sincere move covers dozens of dishonest ones. Honesty opens armor.
laws.reversal: Be consistently honest when long-term trust outweighs short-term gain

laws.name: When Asking for Help, Appeal to Self-Interest, Never Mercy
laws.essence: Show others how helping you benefits them. Self-interest motivates.
laws.reversal: Appeal to mercy only with those who value moral standing

laws.name: Pose as a Friend, Work as a Spy
laws.essence: Gather information in social encounters. Every interaction is intelligence.
laws.reversal: Be genuine when authentic relationships matter more than intel

laws.name: Crush Your Enemy Totally
laws.essence: Leave no embers. A half-defeated enemy will recover and seek revenge.
laws.reversal: Show mercy when the enemy can become a useful ally

laws.name: Use Absence to Increase Respect and Honor
laws.essence: Too much presence cheapens you. Create value through scarcity.
laws.reversal: Stay present when absence would be seen as abandonment

laws.name: Keep Others in Suspended Terror: Cultivate an Air of Unpredictability
laws.essence: Be deliberately unpredictable. They cannot prepare for what they cannot foresee.
laws.reversal: Be predictable when trust and stability are required

laws.name: Do Not Build Fortresses to Protect Yourself - Isolation is Dangerous
laws.essence: Isolation cuts you from information and allies. Circulate among people.
laws.reversal: Isolate temporarily when focus outweighs connection

laws.name: Know Who You're Dealing With - Do Not Offend the Wrong Person
laws.essence: Choose victims carefully. Some people will spend their lives seeking revenge.
laws.reversal: Take calculated risks when the potential gain outweighs enemy danger

laws.name: Do Not Commit to Anyone
laws.essence: Stay independent. Playing sides against each other gives you power.
laws.reversal: Commit fully when loyalty is the only path to power

laws.name: Play a Sucker to Catch a Sucker - Seem Dumber Than Your Mark
laws.essence: Make others feel smart. They'll never suspect your real motives.
laws.reversal: Show intelligence when respect is needed more than surprise

laws.name: Use the Surrender Tactic: Transform Weakness into Power
laws.essence: When weaker, surrender. It gives you time to recover and torment them.
laws.reversal: Fight when surrender would mean permanent loss

laws.name: Concentrate Your Forces
laws.essence: Intensity defeats extensity. Find the one key source of power.
laws.reversal: Diversify when concentration creates single points of failure

laws.name: Play the Perfect Courtier
laws.essence: Master indirection. Flatter, yield to superiors, assert power obliquely.
laws.reversal: Be direct when dealing with those who despise politics

laws.name: Re-Create Yourself
laws.essence: Don't accept the role society assigns. Forge a new identity.
laws.reversal: Embrace your assigned role when authenticity builds trust

laws.name: Keep Your Hands Clean
laws.essence: Use others as scapegoats. Maintain a spotless appearance.
laws.reversal: Take responsibility when owning mistakes builds credibility

laws.name: Play on People's Need to Believe to Create a Cultlike Following
laws.essence: Offer people a cause. They will follow with fervor.
laws.reversal: Appeal to reason when followers need practicality over faith

laws.name: Enter Action with Boldness
laws.essence: Hesitation creates problems. Bold mistakes are easier to correct than timid ones.
laws.reversal: Be cautious when mistakes are irreversible

laws.name: Plan All the Way to the End
laws.essence: Consider all consequences. Don't be overwhelmed by circumstances.
laws.reversal: Stay flexible when the end is genuinely unknowable

laws.name: Make Your Accomplishments Seem Effortless
laws.essence: Conceal the toil behind your work. Teach no one your tricks.
laws.reversal: Show effort when relatability matters more than awe

laws.name: Control the Options: Get Others to Play with the Cards You Deal
laws.essence: Give choices that all serve you. They feel free but you win either way.
laws.reversal: Offer genuine choices when trust is more valuable than control

laws.name: Play to People's Fantasies
laws.essence: Truth is ugly. Conjure romance and fantasy; people flock to dreams.
laws.reversal: Be truthful when reality serves your purpose better

laws.name: Discover Each Man's Thumbscrew
laws.essence: Everyone has a weakness. Find it and you have leverage.
laws.reversal: Ignore weaknesses when mutual benefit is the stronger play

laws.name: Be Royal in Your Own Fashion: Act Like a King to Be Treated Like One
laws.essence: Act with self-respect. Appear destined for great things.
laws.reversal: Be humble when humility opens more doors than regality

laws.name: Master the Art of Timing
laws.essence: Never seem hurried. Detect the spirit of the times. Strike when ripe.
laws.reversal: Move quickly when delay means missing the window

laws.name: Disdain Things You Cannot Have: Ignoring Them is the Best Revenge
laws.essence: Acknowledging problems gives them credibility. Ignore and move on.
laws.reversal: Address problems when ignoring them causes greater damage

laws.name: Create Compelling Spectacles
laws.essence: Striking imagery and symbols create an aura of power.
laws.reversal: Be understated when spectacle would seem desperate

laws.name: Think as You Like but Behave Like Others
laws.essence: Flaunting unconventional ideas draws attack. Blend in, share only with tolerant allies.
laws.reversal: Stand out when originality is rewarded over conformity

laws.name: Stir Up Waters to Catch Fish
laws.essence: Anger and emotion are counterproductive. Make enemies emotional, stay calm.
laws.reversal: Stay calm always; this law has no reversal

laws.name: Despise the Free Lunch
laws.essence: What is free hides costs. Pay your way to stay clear of obligation.
laws.reversal: Accept gifts when refusing would cause greater offense

laws.name: Avoid Stepping into a Great Man's Shoes
laws.essence: Successors to greatness must outshine doubly. Establish your own identity.
laws.reversal: Embrace the predecessor's legacy when it strengthens your position

laws.name: Strike the Shepherd and the Sheep Will Scatter
laws.essence: Trouble traces to individuals. Neutralize the source, others follow.
laws.reversal: Convert the shepherd when their followers are the real prize

laws.name: Work on the Hearts and Minds of Others
laws.essence: Coercion breeds resistance. Seduce people to want to move in your direction.
laws.reversal: Use coercion when time is short and resistance is weak

laws.name: Disarm and Infuriate with the Mirror Effect
laws.essence: Mirror enemies' actions. It mocks them and makes them overreact.
laws.reversal: Create original responses when mirroring seems weak

laws.name: Preach the Need for Change, but Never Reform Too Much at Once
laws.essence: Too much innovation is traumatic. Make change feel like improvement on the past.
laws.reversal: Reform drastically when the old order is universally despised

laws.name: Never Appear Too Perfect
laws.essence: Envy creates silent enemies. Display occasional defects to appear human.
laws.reversal: Appear perfect when awe is needed more than relatability

laws.name: Do Not Go Past the Mark You Aimed For; In Victory, Learn When to Stop
laws.essence: Overconfidence in victory creates new enemies. Set a goal, reach it, stop.
laws.reversal: Press advantage when stopping would allow recovery

laws.name: Assume Formlessness
laws.essence: Be fluid and adaptable. Rigid plans and forms invite attack.
laws.reversal: Take a fixed form when stability is needed to build

quotes: Everything is proceeding as I have foreseen.
The dark side is a pathway to many abilities some consider to be... unnatural.
